Notes: Initial pseudostate points to TransportationMode.
TransportationMode state is explicitly modeled.
selectorPressed leaves transportation mode and enters On with deactivation action.
SwitchingOff represents part of the shutdown sequence but only after the 5 second threshold.
Release before shutdown does not return to On in the student model.
The 5 second condition is modeled on entry to SwitchingOff but Off occurs only after selectorReleased.
Off state is explicitly modeled.
selectorPressed from Off to On is present.
On is modeled as a composite state containing home and cooking behavior.
No history state is modeled for returning to the prior On substate.
selectorHeld starts a shutdown state but only with a time guard and without early release behavior.
bowlRemoved returns from Cooking to Home and also cancels shutdown warning.
The initial substate of On enters HomeScreen.
HomeScreen represents the home state.
HomeScreen transitions to ShutdownWarning after 14m30s.
Start after recipe selection enters the cooking ingredient adding flow.
The start transition requires bowlPlaced which is equivalent to the bowl not being removed.
Entering AddIngredients implies ingredient handling but no explicit setIngredients action is shown.
ShutdownWarning represents the automatic shutdown warning state.
ShutdownWarning goes to Off after 30 seconds.
Cancel returns from ShutdownWarning to HomeScreen.
AddIngredients represents the ingredient prompt and weighing state.
The model can return to AddIngredients for further ingredients after cooking but lacks the specified next self loop.
correctAmountAdded is modeled but moreIngredientsRequired is not guarded on this step.
Further ingredient prompting is implied by promptAddIngredients but no setIngredients action is explicit.
AddIngredients transitions to Chopping on next when the amount is correct.
The correct amount guard is present but no explicit no more ingredients condition is modeled.
Chopping behavior is modeled but speed and time setup is not explicit.
Chopping represents the chopping state.
There is no transition from chopping completion back to ingredient prompting.
The model does not guard a chop to ingredient prompt transition with these conditions.
No setIngredients action is associated with leaving Chop for more ingredients.
After chopping completes the model waits for next and then enters CookingStep.
choppingCompleted is represented but the no more ingredients condition is not explicit.
Cooking behavior is modeled but cooking speed and time setup is not explicit.
CookingStep represents the cooking state.
Cooking completion can lead through CookingDone back to AddIngredients for more ingredients.
More ingredients are implied by promptAddIngredients but the full guard is not explicit.
Returning to AddIngredients implies prompting but no explicit setIngredients action is shown.
Cooking completion can lead through CookingDone to MealReady.
lastStepCompleted is equivalent to no further ingredients being required.
MealReady represents the ready to serve state.
No inactivity timeout from MealReady to ShutdownWarning is modeled.
